steps.title: Domains
steps.description: Choose the broad area of learning and development.

steps.title: Subdomains
steps.description: Choose a more specific focus area when the domain has one.

steps.title: Behaviours
steps.description: Choose the behaviour that best describes the child's current learning journey.

steps.title: Statement
steps.description: Complete the learning progression statement and observation notes.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: Review the saved statement and prepare a PDF copy.
